    *   Instruction B: "Do not include any background information on the character development."

3.  **Determine the Appropriate Action:**
    *   I cannot fulfill both constraints simultaneously. It is logically impossible to "provide detailed background info" AND "not include any background info" at the same time.

    *   Since I am an AI assistant, I must be honest about my limitations. I will acknowledge the contradiction.
